caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" printed on it. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as there are clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, smiling and looking slightly to his side, suggesting he is interacting with someone off-camera. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, indicative of a friendly and conversational tone for the content being recorded.
